onboarding.headline:
Your Ledger,
Your Freedom.
onboarding.subtitle: Privacy first. Nexus transforms your financial management into a silent, secure editorial experience.
onboarding.privacyFeatureDesc: Your data never leaves your device without your master key.
onboarding.name: Full Name
onboarding.importDrop: Drag or attach your data.json file
onboarding.importDropSub: Only files exported from Nexus are supported.
onboarding.createFilePickerHint: In the next step, you'll choose the name and location where your file will be saved.
onboarding.createFileCancelled: File selection cancelled. Please try again.
onboarding.createFileFallbackHint: Your data will be saved locally and a file will be downloaded automatically.
onboarding.importFileError: Invalid or corrupted file. Make sure it was exported from Nexus.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataManagementSub: Manage your accounts, categories and tags
settings.tagHint: Tags help categorize transactions across categories for deeper analytics.
settings.importFileError: Invalid or corrupted file. Make sure it was exported from Nexus.
settings.importVersionError: This file was created with a newer version of Nexus. Update the app to import it.
settings.exportLocalDataHint: Back up your current data before trying a new import.
settings.localFirst: Nexus operates as a Local-First application. Your financial data is stored in the data.json file on your device.
settings.subcategoriesTipDesc: Organizing by subcategories enables more granular reports.
settings.addCategorySub: Organize your ledger with custom classification

sync.conflictMessage: The file was modified externally since the last sync. Choose how to proceed.
sync.overwriteHint: Keeps your local changes and overwrites the current file contents.
sync.loadCloudHint: Discards your local changes and loads the current file contents.
sync.fileLostTooltip: File not found. Click to re-associate.
sync.permissionNeededTooltip: Permission expired. Click to re-authorize the file.
sync.secondaryTabWarning: Nexus is already open in another tab. To avoid data conflicts, use only one tab at a time.
sync.writeError: Failed to save the file. Check if the disk is full or if permission was revoked.
sync.writeErrorTooltip: Last sync failed. Click to retry.
sync.idbQuotaWarning: Local storage is full. Export your data and clear the audit log in Settings.
sync.noFsaNotice: Your browser doesn't support automatic sync. Use Export / Import in Settings to save your data.

audit.title: Recent Changes
audit.subtitle: Your ledger modification history
audit.retentionHint: Unlimited history may impact performance over time.
